## Checklist

- [ ] Bilingual strings (EN + AR) for any new copy
- [ ] RTL verified on AR routes (layout, icons, carousels, form alignment)
- [ ] No PII in logs / URLs / error messages
- [ ] Zod validation on any new input boundary
- [ ] Lighthouse ≥ 90 on affected top routes (if applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/*`) if behaviour or contract changed
